title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 17–19, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Luffy’s crew moves closer to Nami’s truth while Arlong’s crew treats the island as their possession.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Betraying people,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: is her specialty, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, that's enough!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't just make conclusions from false premises!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just what are you trying to say!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami! So you're really...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: 8 years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: I swore on this tattoo that I'd be a member of the ARLONG Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It won't even be long before I raise up the promised amount,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So why would I risk all of that by pulling a stupid stunt like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: that Zoro...! He just had to go and cause more unnecessary trouble...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Of course. My bad, my bad. I apologize for doubting you.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Considering you've been nothing but a loyal crewmember for the past 8 years, you're certainly more than justified to get angry at us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We were a little too rash but we believe you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The ones we need to get rid of right now,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Are Raronoa Zoro and... his companion!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: W-Wait! Help!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What? Usoppp was taken to Arlong Park!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yeah, I just saw him being taken there...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Son of A! I just missed him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yahoo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Faster, faster!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Full Speed Ahead to Arlong Park!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ODA-sensei, this is the spirit of the heart (what Zoro uses to "speak with the sword in his mouth), isn't it? (pen name Arunya) Yes, this is a good

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
